main.title: Main Settings
main.scriptThreadsAuto: (0 = auto, <0 = leave that many cores free)

wallet.title: Wallet
wallet.encryptionStatusNotEncrypted: Wallet is not encrypted - your funds are at risk!
wallet.encryptionHelpEncrypted: Your wallet is protected with a passphrase. You will need to unlock it to send transactions. Click the lock icon in the status bar to quickly lock or unlock.
wallet.encryptionHelpNotEncrypted: Encrypting your wallet adds an extra layer of security. Anyone with access to your computer could steal your funds without encryption.
wallet.autoCombineTargetHint: UTXOs below this amount will be combined. Recommended: near your stake split threshold.
wallet.autoCombineMigrationNotice: "Auto-combine staking rewards" has been replaced with UTXO Consolidation — a more powerful system that consolidates all small UTXOs, not just staking rewards.

network.title: Network
network.proxyHelp: IP address of the proxy (e.g. IPv4: 127.0.0.1 / IPv6: ::1)

window.title: Window Settings
window.minimizeToTray: Minimize to the tray instead of the taskbar

display.title: Display Settings
display.thirdPartyLabel: Third party URLs for transaction info:
display.thirdPartyHelp: Use %s in place of transaction ID. Multiple URLs separated by |
display.hideOrphanStakes: Hide orphan stakes in transaction lists

messages.restartRequired: Client restart required to activate changes.

overridden.title: Setting Overridden
overridden.message: This setting is currently overridden by command-line option: {{flag}}
